---
title: "Jacobsville_Data_Viz"
author: "Barra Peak"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(openxlsx) # read in and export microsoft excel files
library(dplyr) # easier datatable handling
library(tidyverse) # for easier datatable handling
library(stringr) # for easier character data handling
library(tibble) # for easier datatable rearranging
library(ggplot2) # plotting
library(viridis) # viridis color maps
library(forcats)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r load clean u-pb and he data}
upb_data <- read.xlsx("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/repository_data_tables.xlsx", "U.Pb.Data", startRow = 1, fillMergedCells = T, check.names = T)
he_data <- read.xlsx("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/repository_data_tables.xlsx", "U.Th.He.Data", startRow = 1, fillMergedCells = T, check.names = T)
```
```{r load and clean Malone 2016 U-Pb data, echo = F}
malone_data <- drop_na(read.csv("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/Data/Malone_data.csv"))
malone_data <- malone_data %>%
  mutate(
    Concordant = case_when(
    Conc... < 90 ~ "No",
    Conc... > 110 ~ "No",
    .default = "Yes"
    )
  )

malone_data$Site <- str_extract(malone_data$Analysis, "[^- | ^_]+")
malone_data$Site.Factor <- as.factor(malone_data$Site)
#summary(malone_data$Site.Factor)

malone_data_comp <- malone_data %>%
  filter(Site == "Deer") %>%
  filter(Concordant == "Yes")
```
```{r combine and drop disconcordant u-pb dates, echo=FALSE}
all_data <- full_join(upb_data, he_data, by = c("Run", "Sample", "Grain")) %>%
  filter(between(Percent.Concordance, 90, 110)) %>%
  filter(Sample == "BP22-02") %>%
  mutate(ZHe.Report = case_when(Fragment == "Yes" ~ Uncorrected.Date,
                                .default = Corrected.Date)) %>%
  mutate(ZHe.Report.1s = case_when(Fragment == "Yes" ~ Uncorrected.Date.1s,
                                .default = Corrected.Date.Analytical.FT.Uncertainty.1s)) %>%
  mutate(FT.Applied = case_when(Fragment == "Yes" ~ "No",
                                .default = "Yes"))
```
```{r calculate max alpha dose and uncertainty}
L238 <- 0.00000000015512 #decay constants in yr
L235 <- 0.00000000098485
L232 <- 0.0000000000499
L147 <- (log(2)/(1.06*10^(11)))
Av <- 6.022*10^(23) # avogadro's number

all_data <- all_data %>%
  mutate(U238.atoms.g = (0.9928*U.ppm*10^(-6)/238)*Av) %>%
  mutate(U238.a.g.u = (0.9928*U.ppm.1s*10^(-6)/238)*Av) %>%
  mutate(U235.atoms.g = (0.0072*U.ppm*10^(-6)/235)*Av) %>%
  mutate(U235.a.g.u = (0.0072*U.ppm.1s*10^(-6)/235)*Av) %>%
  mutate(Th.atoms.g = (Th.ppm*10^(-6)/232)*Av) %>%
  mutate(Th.a.g.u = (Th.ppm.1s*10^(-6)/232)*Av) %>%
  mutate(Sm.atoms.g = (Sm.ppm*10^(-6)/147)*Av) %>%
  mutate(Sm.a.g.u = (Sm.ppm.1s*10^(-6)/232)*Av) %>%
  mutate(Max.Alpha.Dose = 8*U238.atoms.g*(exp(L238*Pb207.Pb206_Date*10^6)-1) + 
  7*U235.atoms.g*(exp(L235*Pb207.Pb206_Date*10^6)-1) + 
  6*Th.atoms.g*(exp(L232*Pb207.Pb206_Date*10^6)-1) +
    Sm.atoms.g*(exp(L147*Pb207.Pb206_Date*10^6)-1)) %>% # keep editing here
  mutate(A.u = 8*U238.atoms.g*(exp(L238*Pb207.Pb206_Date*10^6)-1)*
           sqrt((U238.a.g.u/U238.atoms.g)^2 + 
                  (L238*Pb207.Pb206_Date.2SE/2)^2)) %>%
  mutate(B.u = 7*U235.atoms.g*(exp(L235*Pb207.Pb206_Date*10^6)-1)*
           sqrt((U235.a.g.u/U235.atoms.g)^2 + (L235*Pb207.Pb206_Date.2SE/2)^2)) %>%
  mutate(C.u = 6*Th.atoms.g*(exp(L232*Pb207.Pb206_Date*10^6)-1)*
           sqrt((Th.a.g.u/Th.atoms.g)^2 + (L232*Pb207.Pb206_Date.2SE/2)^2)) %>%
  mutate(D.u = case_when(Sm.ppm == 0 ~ 0,
                         .default = 6*Sm.atoms.g*(exp(L147*Pb207.Pb206_Date*10^6)-1)*
           sqrt((Sm.a.g.u/Sm.atoms.g)^2 + (L147*Pb207.Pb206_Date.2SE/2)^2))) %>%
  mutate(Max.Alpha.Dose.1s = sqrt(A.u^2 + B.u^2 + C.u^2 + D.u^2)) %>%
  select(!c(A.u, B.u, C.u, D.u))
```
```{r Figure S1. combined density plots, echo = F}
binwidth = 30
# define density functions
# new data
upb_density <- density(all_data$Pb207.Pb206_Date, bw = binwidth)
upb_density.fun <- data.frame("x" = unlist(upb_density[[1]]), "y" = unlist(upb_density[[2]]))
peak1 <- data.frame("x" = upb_density.fun[which(upb_density.fun == max(upb_density.fun$y), arr.ind=TRUE)[1], 1], "y" = max(upb_density.fun$y))
peak2 <- data.frame("x" = upb_density.fun[which(upb_density.fun == max(upb_density.fun[upb_density.fun$x > 1700, ]$y), arr.ind=TRUE)[1], 1], "y" = max(upb_density.fun[upb_density.fun$x > 1700, ]$y))
peak3 <- data.frame("x" = upb_density.fun[which(upb_density.fun == max(upb_density.fun[upb_density.fun$x > 2500, ]$y), arr.ind=TRUE)[1], 1], "y" = max(upb_density.fun[upb_density.fun$x > 2500, ]$y))
# malone data
malone_density <- density(malone_data_comp$X206Pb..207Pb..age, bw = binwidth)
malone_density.fun <- data.frame("x" = unlist(malone_density[[1]]), "y" = unlist(malone_density[[2]]))
peak1m <- data.frame("x" = malone_density.fun[which(malone_density.fun == max(malone_density.fun$y), arr.ind=TRUE)[1], 1], "y" = max(malone_density.fun$y))
peak2m <- data.frame("x" = malone_density.fun[which(malone_density.fun == max(malone_density.fun[malone_density.fun$x > 1700, ]$y), arr.ind=TRUE)[1], 1], "y" = max(malone_density.fun[malone_density.fun$x > 1700, ]$y))
peak3m <- data.frame("x" = malone_density.fun[which(malone_density.fun == max(malone_density.fun[malone_density.fun$x > 2500, ]$y), arr.ind=TRUE)[1], 1], "y" = max(malone_density.fun[malone_density.fun$x > 2500, ]$y))


p.density.c <- 
  ggplot() +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 980, xmax = 1010, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Rigolet
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1020, xmax = 1090, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Ottawan
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1070, xmax = 1110, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#72190E") + # MCR
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1140, xmax = 1190, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .2, fill = "#997700") + # Shawinigan
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1200, xmax = 1250, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .2, fill = "#997700") + # Elezevirian
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1300, xmax = 1360, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#332288") + #Pre-Elzevierian
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1340, xmax = 1370, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#332288") + # SGGRP south
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1380, xmax = 1520, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#332288") + # EGGRP from south + east
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1600, xmax = 1700, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Mazatzal, from west
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1820, xmax = 1880, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Penokean from S and E
  # annotate("rect", xmin = 1800, xmax = 2000, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "green") + # Trans Hudson Orogen from west or recycled
  annotate("rect", xmin = 2700, xmax = 3000, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Superior Province from N
  geom_density(data = malone_data_comp, aes(x = X206Pb..207Pb..age), bw = binwidth, fill = "gray", alpha = 0.6, adjust = 2) +   # kernal density
  # geom_rug(data = all_data, aes(x = Pb207.Pb206_Date), alpha = 0.4, position = "jitter", outside = TRUE, color = "red") +
  # geom_rug(data = malone_data_comp, aes(x = X206Pb..207Pb..age),alpha = 0.4, sides = "b", outside = FALSE, color = "blue") +
   geom_density(data = all_data, aes(x = Pb207.Pb206_Date), bw = binwidth, fill = "black", alpha = 0.6, adjust = 2) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  xlim(500, 3000) +
  xlab("207Pb/206Pb Date (Ma)") +
  ylab("Density") +
  annotate("text", x = 2000, y = 0.003, label = "U/Pb This Study", colour =  "black", hjust = 0) +
  annotate("text", x = 2000, y = 0.0028, label = paste("n =", nrow(all_data)), colour =  "black", hjust = 0) +
  annotate("text",x = 2000, y = 0.0022, label = paste("Kernel Binwidth =", round(upb_density$bw,2)), colour = "black", hjust = 0) +
  annotate("text", x=1395-200, y = 0.0021, label = paste(signif(peak1[1], 3)), colour = "black") +
  annotate("text", x  = 1852+200, y = 0.0006, label = paste(signif(peak2[1], 3)), colour = "black") +
  annotate("text", x = 2700, y = 0.0002, label = paste(signif(peak3[1], 3)), colour = "black") +
  annotate("text", x = 2000, y = 0.0026, label = "U/Pb Malone et al. (2020)", colour =  "gray", hjust = 0) +
  annotate("text", x = 2000, y = 0.0024, label = paste("n =", nrow(malone_data_comp)), colour =  "gray", hjust = 0) +
  #annotate("text", x = 350, y = 0.00175, label = paste("Kernel Binwidth =", round(malone_density$bw,2)), colour = "blue") +
  # annotate("text", x=1422+150, y = 0.003, label = paste(signif(peak1m[1], 2)), colour = "blue") +
  # annotate("text", x  = 1887, y = 0.00075, label = paste(signif(peak2m[1], 2)), colour = "blue") +
  # annotate("text", x = 2717, y = 0.00002, label = paste(signif(peak3m[1], 2)), colour = "blue") +
  
  #scale_y_continuous(sec.axis = sec_axis(~.*yas, name="Kernal Density")) +
  #ggtitle(paste("Bin size =", as.character(bw), sep = " ")) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size=12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 11))
p.density.c
ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R.Fig.S1B.pdf", plot = p.density.c, width = 6.5, height = 3)
```
```{r U-Pb K-S test}
ks <- ks.test(x = all_data$Pb207.Pb206_Date, y = malone_data_comp$X206Pb..207Pb..age, alternative = "two.sided")
print(ks$p.value)
```
```{r cumulative density function plot, echo = F}
upb_ts <- all_data %>%
  select(Pb207.Pb206_Date) %>%
  mutate(Source = "This Study")
upb_m <- malone_data_comp %>%
  select(X206Pb..207Pb..age) %>%
  rename("Pb207.Pb206_Date" = "X206Pb..207Pb..age") %>%
  mutate(Source = "Malone et al. (2020)")
upb_cdf_data <- rbind(upb_ts, upb_m)

upb_cdf <- upb_cdf_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Pb207.Pb206_Date, group = Source, color = Source)) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 980, xmax = 1010, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Rigolet
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1020, xmax = 1090, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Ottawan
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1070, xmax = 1110, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#72190E") + # MCR
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1140, xmax = 1190, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .2, fill = "#997700") + # Shawinigan
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1200, xmax = 1250, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .2, fill = "#997700") + # Elezevirian
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1300, xmax = 1360, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#332288") + #Pre-Elzevierian
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1340, xmax = 1370, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#332288") + # SGGRP south
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1380, xmax = 1520, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#332288") + # EGGRP from south + east
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1600, xmax = 1700, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Mazatzal, from west
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1820, xmax = 1880, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Penokean from S and E
  # annotate("rect", xmin = 1800, xmax = 2000, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "green") + # Trans Hudson Orogen from west or recycled
  annotate("rect", xmin = 2700, xmax = 3000, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Superior Province from N
  stat_ecdf() +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  xlim(500, 3000) +
  xlab("207Pb/206Pb Date (Ma)") +
  #scale_x_continuous(name = "207Pb/206Pb Date (Ma)", breaks = seq(1000, 3000, 500)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("This Study" = "black", "Malone et al. (2020)" = "gray")) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "Cumulative Distribution Function", labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.001)) +
  annotate("text", x = 2000, y = 0.2, label = paste("K-S p-value =", signif(ks$p.value, 2)), colour =  "black", hjust = 0) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.position = c(0.75,0.5),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 9, color = "transparent"),
    plot.title = element_text(size=12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 11))
  # theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 0.75),
  #       panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.75),
  #       axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
  #       axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
  #       axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
  #       axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
  #       plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
  #       legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
  #       legend.key = element_blank(),
  #       legend.position = c(0.85,0.75),
  #       legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
  #       legend.title = element_text(size = 11))
upb_cdf

ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R.Fig.S1A.pdf", plot = upb_cdf, width = 6.5, height = 3)
```
```{r ZHe for plotting, echo = FALSE}
ZHe_plot_data <- all_data %>%
  drop_na(He4.fmol) %>%
  mutate(Max.Alpha.Dose = Max.Alpha.Dose/(10^(16))) %>%
  mutate(Max.Alpha.Dose.1s = Max.Alpha.Dose.1s/(10^(16))) %>%
  mutate(Age_Group = case_when(Pb207.Pb206_Date < 1600 ~ "1360 Ma",
                               Pb207.Pb206_Date > 2500 ~ "2640 Ma",
                               .default = "1860 Ma")) %>%
  mutate(Age_Group = factor(Age_Group, levels = c("1360 Ma", "1860 Ma", "2640 Ma"))) %>%
  mutate(Opacity = case_when(ZHe.Report < 100 ~ "transparent",
                             .default = "opaque")) %>%
  mutate(Rejection = case_when(Fragment == "No" & Combined.FT < 0.5 ~ "FT Too Low",
                               U.ng == 0 ~ "No Uranium",
                               ZHe.Report > Pb207.Pb206_Date ~ "ZHe date too old",
                               .default = NA))
summary(ZHe_plot_data$Age_Group)
summary(as.factor(ZHe_plot_data$Rejection))
too_old <- ZHe_plot_data %>%
  filter(Rejection == "ZHe date too old")

color_scale <- "D"
color_breaks <- c(1, 10, 100, 1000)
color_limits <- c(1, 1000)
color_trans <- "log"
```
```{r ZHe vs. eU plot, echo = FALSE}
ZHe_eU <- ZHe_plot_data %>%
  is.na(Rejection) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = eU, y = ZHe.Report, xmin = eU - eU.1s, xmax = eU + eU.1s, ymin = ZHe.Report - ZHe.Report.1s, ymax = ZHe.Report + ZHe.Report.1s, shape = FT.Applied, colour =  Max.Alpha.Dose, alpha = Opacity)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 992, linewidth = 0.5, color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(width = 0)) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(height = 0)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  #scale_color_viridis(option = "C", transform = "log", limits = c(10, 2000), breaks = c(10, 100, 1000), name = "eU (ppm)") +
  #scale_color_viridis(trans = "log", limits = c(5, 780), name = "Max Alpha Dose (a/g x 10^16)") +
  scale_color_viridis(trans = color_trans, option = color_scale, limits = color_limits, breaks = color_breaks, name = "Max Alpha\nDose\n(x1016 a/g)") +
   #scale_color_viridis(option = color_scale, limits = c(0, 800), breaks = seq(0, 800, 100)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("No" = 15, "Yes" = 16), name = "FT Applied") +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("transparent" = 0.4, "opaque" = 1), guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "eU\n(ppm)", limits=c(0, 2500), breaks = seq(0, 2500, 500)) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "ZHe Date (Ma)", limits=c(0, 1800), breaks = seq(0, 1800, 200)) + 
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 0.75),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.75),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.position = "right") +
  facet_wrap(vars(Age_Group), nrow = 3)

ZHe_eU
ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R.Fig.S2eU.pdf", plot = ZHe_eU, width = 3.5, height = 5.5)
```
```{r ZHe vs. alpha plot, echo = FALSE}
ZHe_alpha <- ZHe_plot_data %>%
  is.na(Rejection) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Max.Alpha.Dose, y = ZHe.Report, xmin = Max.Alpha.Dose - Max.Alpha.Dose.1s, xmax = Max.Alpha.Dose + Max.Alpha.Dose.1s, ymin = ZHe.Report - ZHe.Report.1s, ymax = ZHe.Report + ZHe.Report.1s, shape = FT.Applied, colour =  Max.Alpha.Dose, alpha = Opacity)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 992, linewidth = 0.5, color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 100, linewidth = 0.5, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(width = 0)) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(height = 0)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  #scale_color_viridis(option = "C", transform = "log", limits = c(10, 2000), breaks = c(10, 100, 1000), name = "eU (ppm)") +
  #scale_color_viridis(trans = "log", limits = c(5, 780), name = "Max Alpha Dose (a/g x 10^16)") +
  scale_color_viridis(trans = color_trans, option = color_scale, limits = color_limits, breaks = color_breaks, name = "Max Alpha\nDose\n(x1016 a/g)") +
   #scale_color_viridis(option = color_scale, limits = c(0, 800), breaks = seq(0, 800, 100)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("No" = 15, "Yes" = 16), name = "FT Applied") +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("transparent" = 0.4, "opaque" = 1), guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Max Alpha Dose\n(x1016 a/g)", limits=c(0, 1000), breaks = seq(0, 1000, 200)) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "ZHe Date (Ma)", limits=c(0, 1800), breaks = seq(0, 1800, 200)) + 
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 0.75),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.75),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.position = "right") +
  facet_wrap(vars(Age_Group), nrow = 3)

ZHe_alpha
ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R.Fig.S2alpha.pdf", plot = ZHe_alpha, width = 3.5, height = 5.5)
```
```{r ZHe vs. RFT, echo = FALSE}
ZHe_plot_data_RFT <- ZHe_plot_data %>%
  is.na(Rejection) %>%
  filter(FT.Applied == "Yes")
summary(ZHe_plot_data_RFT$Age_Group)

ZHe_RFT <- ZHe_plot_data_RFT %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = RFT, y = ZHe.Report, xmin = RFT - RFT.1s, xmax = RFT + RFT.1s, ymin = ZHe.Report - ZHe.Report.1s, ymax = ZHe.Report + ZHe.Report.1s, shape = FT.Applied, colour =  Max.Alpha.Dose, alpha = Opacity)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 992, linewidth = 0.5, color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(width = 0)) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(height = 0)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  #scale_color_viridis(option = "C", transform = "log", limits = c(10, 2000), breaks = c(10, 100, 1000), name = "eU (ppm)") +
  scale_color_viridis(trans = color_trans, option = color_scale, limits = color_limits, breaks = color_breaks, name = "Max Alpha\nDose\n(x1016 a/g)") +
  #scale_color_viridis(trans = "log", limits = c(5, 780), name = "Max Alpha Dose (a/g x 10^16)") +
  #scale_color_viridis(option = color_scale, limits = color_limits, breaks = color_breaks) +
   #scale_color_viridis(option = color_scale, limits = c(0, 800), breaks = seq(0, 800, 100)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("No" = 15, "Yes" = 16), name = "FT Applied") +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("transparent" = 0.4, "opaque" = 1), guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "FT-Equivalent\nSpherical Radius (µm)", limits=c(0, 200), breaks = seq(0, 200, 25)) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "ZHe Date (Ma)", limits=c(0, 1800), breaks = seq(0, 1800, 200)) + 
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 0.75),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.75),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.position = "right") +
  facet_wrap(vars(Age_Group), nrow = 3)

ZHe_RFT

ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R.Fig.S2RFT.pdf", plot = ZHe_RFT, width = 3.5, height = 5.5)
```

```{r ZHe vs. UPb plot Main Paper, echo = FALSE}
td <- (992.51+0.64 - (((992.51 + 0.64) - (985.5- 35.8))/2)) *10^6 # maximum depositonal age in yr
td.unc <- (((992.51 + 0.64) - (985.5- 35.8))/2) *10^6 # unvertainty on depositional age in yr
ZHe_UPb <- ZHe_plot_data %>%
  is.na(Rejection) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Pb207.Pb206_Date, y = ZHe.Report, xmin = Pb207.Pb206_Date - Pb207.Pb206_Date.2SE, xmax = Pb207.Pb206_Date + Pb207.Pb206_Date.2SE, ymin = ZHe.Report - ZHe.Report.1s, ymax = ZHe.Report + ZHe.Report.1s, shape = FT.Applied, colour =  Max.Alpha.Dose, alpha = Opacity)) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 980, xmax = 1010, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Rigolet
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1020, xmax = 1090, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Ottawan
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1070, xmax = 1110, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#72190E") + # MCR
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1140, xmax = 1190, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Shawinigan
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1200, xmax = 1250, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Elezevirian
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1300, xmax = 1360, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + #Pre-Elzevierian
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1340, xmax = 1370, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # SGGRP south
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1380, xmax = 1520, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # EGGRP from south + east
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1600, xmax = 1700, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Mazatzal, from west
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1820, xmax = 1880, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Penokean from S and E
  # annotate("rect", xmin = 1800, xmax = 2000, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "green") + # Trans Hudson Orogen from west or recycled
  annotate("rect", xmin = 2700, xmax = 3000, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Superior Province from N
  # y axis
    annotate("rect", ymin = 980, ymax = 1010, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Rigolet
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1020, ymax = 1090, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Ottawan
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1070, ymax = 1110, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#72190E") + # MCR
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1140, ymax = 1190, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Shawinigan
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1200, ymax = 1250, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Elezevirian
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1300, ymax = 1360, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + #Pre-Elzevierian
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1340, ymax = 1370, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # SGGRP south
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1380, ymax = 1520, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # EGGRP from south + east
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1600, ymax = 1700, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Mazatzal, from west
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1820, ymax = 1880, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Penokean from S and E
  # annotate("rect", ymin = 1800, ymax = 2000, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "green") + # Trans Hudson Orogen from west or recycled
  annotate("rect", ymin = 2700, ymax = 3000, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Superior
  annotate("rect", xmax = Inf, xmin = - Inf, ymin = 985.5-35.8, ymax = 992.51 + 0.64, fill = "#437DBF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 992.51, linewidth = 0.5, color = "#437DBF") +
  annotate("rect", ymax = Inf, ymin = - Inf, xmin = 985.5-35.8, xmax = 992.51 + 0.64, fill = "#437DBF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 992.51, linewidth = 0.5, color = "#437DBF") +
  # annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = 980, ymax = 1250,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "orange") + 
  # annotate("rect", xmin = 980, xmax = 1250, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "orange") +
  # annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = 1350, ymax = 1500,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "pink") + 
  # annotate("rect", xmin = 1350, xmax = 1500, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "pink") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1,  linewidth = 0.5, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(width = 0), option = "x") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(height = 0), option = "y") +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  #scale_color_viridis(option = "C", transform = "log", limits = c(10, 2000), breaks = c(10, 100, 1000), name = "eU (ppm)") +
  #scale_color_viridis(trans = "log", limits = c(5, 780), name = "Max Alpha Dose (a/g x 10^16)") +
  scale_color_viridis(trans = "log", option = color_scale, limits = color_limits, breaks = color_breaks, name = "Max Alpha\nDose\n(x1016 a/g)") +
   #scale_color_viridis(option = color_scale, limits = c(0, 800), breaks = seq(0, 800, 100)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("No" = 15, "Yes" = 16), name = "FT Applied") +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("transparent" = 0.4, "opaque" = 1), guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "207Pb/206Pb Date (Ma)", limits=c(0, 3500), breaks = seq(0, 3000, 500)) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "ZHe Date (Ma)", limits=c(0, 2400), breaks = seq(0, 2000, 200)) + 
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 0.75),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.75),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.position = "none")

ZHe_UPb
ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R.Fig.3.pdf", plot = ZHe_UPb, width = 4, height = 4)
```
```{r density plots for Fig 3, echo = F}
upb.density.3 <- 
  ggplot() +
   geom_density(data = all_data, aes(x = Pb207.Pb206_Date), bw = binwidth, fill = "black", alpha = 0.6, adjust = 2) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  xlim(0, 3000) +
  xlab("207Pb/206Pb Date (Ma)") +
  ylab("Density") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size=12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 11))
upb.density.3
ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R.Fig.3upb.pdf", plot = upb.density.3, width = 4, height = 2)

zhe.density.3 <- all_data %>%
  is.na(Rejection) %>%
  drop_na(ZHe.Report) %>%
  ggplot() +
   geom_density(aes(x = ZHe.Report), bw = binwidth, fill = "black", alpha = 0.6, adjust = 2) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  xlim(0, 2000) +
  xlab("ZHe Date (Ma)") +
  ylab("Density") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size=12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 11))
zhe.density.3
ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R.Fig.3zhe.pdf", plot = zhe.density.3, width = 4, height = 2)
```

```{r ZHe vs. UPb plot Ft consideration, echo = FALSE}
ZHe_UPb_FT <- ZHe_plot_data %>%
  mutate(FT_date_plot = case_when(is.na(Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance) == F ~ Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance,
                                  .default = ZHe.Report)) %>%
  mutate(FT_date_plot.1s = case_when(is.na(Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance) == F ~ Corrected.Date.No.FT.Inheritance.Analytical.Uncertainty.1s,
                                  .default = ZHe.Report.1s)) %>%
  mutate(FT.Applied = case_when(is.na(Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance) == F ~ "Since Deposition Only",
                                .default = FT.Applied)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Pb207.Pb206_Date, y = FT_date_plot, xmin = Pb207.Pb206_Date - Pb207.Pb206_Date.2SE, xmax = Pb207.Pb206_Date + Pb207.Pb206_Date.2SE, ymin = FT_date_plot - FT_date_plot.1s, ymax = FT_date_plot + FT_date_plot.1s, shape = FT.Applied, colour =  Max.Alpha.Dose, alpha = Opacity)) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 980, xmax = 1010, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Rigolet
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1020, xmax = 1090, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Ottawan
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1070, xmax = 1110, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#72190E") + # MCR
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1140, xmax = 1190, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Shawinigan
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1200, xmax = 1250, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Elezevirian
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1300, xmax = 1360, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + #Pre-Elzevierian
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1340, xmax = 1370, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # SGGRP south
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1380, xmax = 1520, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # EGGRP from south + east
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1600, xmax = 1700, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Mazatzal, from west
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1820, xmax = 1880, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Penokean from S and E
  # annotate("rect", xmin = 1800, xmax = 2000, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "green") + # Trans Hudson Orogen from west or recycled
  annotate("rect", xmin = 2700, xmax = 3000, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Superior Province from N
  # y axis
    annotate("rect", ymin = 980, ymax = 1010, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Rigolet
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1020, ymax = 1090, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Ottawan
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1070, ymax = 1110, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#72190E") + # MCR
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1140, ymax = 1190, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Shawinigan
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1200, ymax = 1250, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Elezevirian
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1300, ymax = 1360, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + #Pre-Elzevierian
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1340, ymax = 1370, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # SGGRP south
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1380, ymax = 1520, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # EGGRP from south + east
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1600, ymax = 1700, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Mazatzal, from west
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1820, ymax = 1880, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Penokean from S and E
  # annotate("rect", ymin = 1800, ymax = 2000, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "green") + # Trans Hudson Orogen from west or recycled
  annotate("rect", ymin = 2700, ymax = 3000, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Superior
  annotate("rect", xmax = Inf, xmin = - Inf, ymin = 985.5-35.8, ymax = 992.51 + 0.64, fill = "#437DBF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 992.51, linewidth = 0.5, color = "#437DBF") +
  annotate("rect", ymax = Inf, ymin = - Inf, xmin = 985.5-35.8, xmax = 992.51 + 0.64, fill = "#437DBF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 992.51, linewidth = 0.5, color = "#437DBF") +
  # annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = 980, ymax = 1250,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "orange") + 
  # annotate("rect", xmin = 980, xmax = 1250, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "orange") +
  # annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = 1350, ymax = 1500,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "pink") + 
  # annotate("rect", xmin = 1350, xmax = 1500, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "pink") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1,  linewidth = 0.5, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(width = 0)) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(height = 0)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  #scale_color_viridis(option = "C", transform = "log", limits = c(10, 2000), breaks = c(10, 100, 1000), name = "eU (ppm)") +
  #scale_color_viridis(trans = "log", limits = c(5, 780), name = "Max Alpha Dose (a/g x 10^16)") +
  scale_color_viridis(trans = "log", option = color_scale, limits = color_limits, breaks = color_breaks) +
   #scale_color_viridis(option = color_scale, limits = c(0, 800), breaks = seq(0, 800, 100)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("No" = 15, "Yes" = 16, "Since Deposition Only" = 17), name = "FT Applied") +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("transparent" = 0.4, "opaque" = 1), guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "207Pb/206Pb Date (Ma)", limits=c(0, 3500), breaks = seq(0, 3000, 500)) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "ZHe Date (Ma)", limits=c(0, 2400), breaks = seq(0, 2000, 200)) + 
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 0.75),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.75),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.position = "none")

ZHe_UPb_FT
ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R.Fig.S3.pdf", plot = ZHe_UPb_FT, width = 4, height = 4)
```
```{r ZHe_FT vs. ZHe plot consideration, echo = FALSE}
ZHe_FT_comp <- ZHe_plot_data %>%
  is.na(Rejection) %>%
  mutate(FT_date_plot = case_when(is.na(Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance) == F ~ Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance,
                                  .default = ZHe.Report)) %>%
  mutate(FT_date_plot.1s = case_when(is.na(Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance) == F ~ Corrected.Date.No.FT.Inheritance.Analytical.Uncertainty.1s,
                                  .default = ZHe.Report.1s)) %>%
  mutate(FT.Applied = case_when(is.na(Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance) == F ~ "Since Deposition Only",
                                .default = FT.Applied)) %>%
  drop_na(Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = ZHe.Report, y = FT_date_plot, xmin = ZHe.Report - ZHe.Report.1s, xmax = ZHe.Report + ZHe.Report.1s, ymin = FT_date_plot - FT_date_plot.1s, ymax = FT_date_plot + FT_date_plot.1s, shape = FT.Applied, colour =  Max.Alpha.Dose, alpha = Opacity)) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 980, xmax = 1010, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Rigolet
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1020, xmax = 1090, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Ottawan
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1070, xmax = 1110, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#72190E") + # MCR
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1140, xmax = 1190, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Shawinigan
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1200, xmax = 1250, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Elezevirian
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1300, xmax = 1360, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + #Pre-Elzevierian
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1340, xmax = 1370, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # SGGRP south
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1380, xmax = 1520, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # EGGRP from south + east
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1600, xmax = 1700, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Mazatzal, from west
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1820, xmax = 1880, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Penokean from S and E
  # annotate("rect", xmin = 1800, xmax = 2000, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "green") + # Trans Hudson Orogen from west or recycled
  annotate("rect", xmin = 2700, xmax = 3000, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Superior Province from N
  # y axis
    annotate("rect", ymin = 980, ymax = 1010, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Rigolet
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1020, ymax = 1090, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Ottawan
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1070, ymax = 1110, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#72190E") + # MCR
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1140, ymax = 1190, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Shawinigan
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1200, ymax = 1250, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Elezevirian
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1300, ymax = 1360, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + #Pre-Elzevierian
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1340, ymax = 1370, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # SGGRP south
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1380, ymax = 1520, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # EGGRP from south + east
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1600, ymax = 1700, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Mazatzal, from west
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1820, ymax = 1880, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Penokean from S and E
  # annotate("rect", ymin = 1800, ymax = 2000, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "green") + # Trans Hudson Orogen from west or recycled
  annotate("rect", ymin = 2700, ymax = 3000, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Superior
  annotate("rect", xmax = Inf, xmin = - Inf, ymin = 985.5-35.8, ymax = 992.51 + 0.64, fill = "#437DBF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 992.51, linewidth = 0.5, color = "#437DBF") +
  annotate("rect", ymax = Inf, ymin = - Inf, xmin = 985.5-35.8, xmax = 992.51 + 0.64, fill = "#437DBF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 992.51, linewidth = 0.5, color = "#437DBF") +
  # annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = 980, ymax = 1250,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "orange") + 
  # annotate("rect", xmin = 980, xmax = 1250, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "orange") +
  # annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = 1350, ymax = 1500,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "pink") + 
  # annotate("rect", xmin = 1350, xmax = 1500, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "pink") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1,  linewidth = 0.5, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(width = 0)) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(height = 0)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  #scale_color_viridis(option = "C", transform = "log", limits = c(10, 2000), breaks = c(10, 100, 1000), name = "eU (ppm)") +
  #scale_color_viridis(trans = "log", limits = c(5, 780), name = "Max Alpha Dose (a/g x 10^16)") +
  scale_color_viridis(trans = "log", option = color_scale, limits = color_limits, breaks = color_breaks) +
   #scale_color_viridis(option = color_scale, limits = c(0, 800), breaks = seq(0, 800, 100)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("No" = 15, "Yes" = 16, "Since Deposition Only" = 17), name = "FT Applied") +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("transparent" = 0.4, "opaque" = 1), guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "ZHe Date, Normal FT Correction (Ma)", limits=c(900, 1700), breaks = seq(900, 1700, 200)) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "ZHe Date, FT Correction Since Deposition Only (Ma)", limits=c(900, 1700), breaks = seq(900, 1700, 200)) + 
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 0.75),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.75),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.position = "none")

ZHe_FT_comp
ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R.Fig.S3_inset.pdf", plot = ZHe_FT_comp, width = 2.5, height = 2.5)
```
```{r ZHe_FT vs. ZHe plot consideration zoomed in, echo = FALSE}
ZHe_FT_comp_zoom <- ZHe_plot_data %>%
  is.na(Rejection) %>%
  mutate(FT_date_plot = case_when(is.na(Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance) == F ~ Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance,
                                  .default = ZHe.Report)) %>%
  mutate(FT_date_plot.1s = case_when(is.na(Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance) == F ~ Corrected.Date.No.FT.Inheritance.Analytical.Uncertainty.1s,
                                  .default = ZHe.Report.1s)) %>%
  mutate(FT.Applied = case_when(is.na(Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance) == F ~ "Since Deposition Only",
                                .default = FT.Applied)) %>%
  drop_na(Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance) %>%
  filter(ZHe.Report < 1300) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = ZHe.Report, y = FT_date_plot, xmin = ZHe.Report - ZHe.Report.1s, xmax = ZHe.Report + ZHe.Report.1s, ymin = FT_date_plot - FT_date_plot.1s, ymax = FT_date_plot + FT_date_plot.1s, shape = FT.Applied, colour =  Max.Alpha.Dose, alpha = Opacity)) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 980, xmax = 1010, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Rigolet
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1020, xmax = 1090, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Ottawan
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1070, xmax = 1110, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#72190E") + # MCR
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1140, xmax = 1190, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Shawinigan
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1200, xmax = 1250, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Elezevirian
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1300, xmax = 1360, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + #Pre-Elzevierian
  # y axis
    annotate("rect", ymin = 980, ymax = 1010, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Rigolet
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1020, ymax = 1090, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Ottawan
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1070, ymax = 1110, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#72190E") + # MCR
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1140, ymax = 1190, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Shawinigan
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1200, ymax = 1250, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Elezevirian
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1300, ymax = 1360, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + #Pre-Elzevierian
  annotate("rect", xmax = Inf, xmin = - Inf, ymin = 985.5-35.8, ymax = 992.51 + 0.64, fill = "#437DBF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 992.51, linewidth = 0.5, color = "#437DBF") +
  annotate("rect", ymax = Inf, ymin = - Inf, xmin = 985.5-35.8, xmax = 992.51 + 0.64, fill = "#437DBF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 992.51, linewidth = 0.5, color = "#437DBF") +
  # annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = 980, ymax = 1250,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "orange") + 
  # annotate("rect", xmin = 980, xmax = 1250, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "orange") +
  # annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = 1350, ymax = 1500,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "pink") + 
  # annotate("rect", xmin = 1350, xmax = 1500, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "pink") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1,  linewidth = 0.5, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(width = 0)) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(height = 0)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  #scale_color_viridis(option = "C", transform = "log", limits = c(10, 2000), breaks = c(10, 100, 1000), name = "eU (ppm)") +
  #scale_color_viridis(trans = "log", limits = c(5, 780), name = "Max Alpha Dose (a/g x 10^16)") +
  scale_color_viridis(trans = "log", option = color_scale, limits = color_limits, breaks = color_breaks) +
   #scale_color_viridis(option = color_scale, limits = c(0, 800), breaks = seq(0, 800, 100)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("None" = 15, "Conventional" = 16, "Since Deposition Only" = 17), name = "FT Applied") +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("transparent" = 0.4, "opaque" = 1), guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "ZHe Date, Conventional FT Correction (Ma)", limits=c(900, 1300), breaks = seq(900, 1300, 100)) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "ZHe Date FR Correction Since Deposition Only (Ma)", limits=c(900, 1300), breaks = seq(900, 1300, 100)) + 
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 0.75),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.75),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.position = "none")

ZHe_FT_comp_zoom
ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R.Fig.S3_zoom.pdf", plot = ZHe_FT_comp_zoom, width = 4, height = 4)
```
```{r ZHe cumulative density function plot, echo = F}
ZHe_cdf_data <- ZHe_plot_data %>%
  is.na(Rejection) %>%
  filter(Fragment == "No") %>%
  mutate(FT_date_plot = case_when(is.na(Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance) == F ~ Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance,
                                  .default = ZHe.Report)) %>%
  mutate(FT_date_plot.1s = case_when(is.na(Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance) == F ~ Corrected.Date.No.FT.Inheritance.Analytical.Uncertainty.1s,
                                  .default = ZHe.Report.1s)) %>%
  mutate(FT.Applied = case_when(is.na(Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance) == F ~ "Since Deposition Only",
                                .default = FT.Applied)) %>%
  select(c(Run, Sample, Grain, Fragment, Uncorrected.Date, ZHe.Report, FT_date_plot, FT.Applied))  %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Uncorrected.Date, ZHe.Report, FT_date_plot), names_to = "Date_Type", values_to = "Date") %>%
  mutate("FT_cor" = case_when(Date_Type == "Uncorrected.Date" ~ "None",
                              Date_Type == "ZHe.Report" ~ "Conventional (Entire History)",
                              .default = "Since Deposition Only")) %>%
  mutate(FT_cor = factor(FT_cor, levels = c("None", "Conventional (Entire History)", "Since Deposition Only")))

### KS tests ----
ft_none <- ZHe_cdf_data %>%
  filter(Date_Type == "Uncorrected.Date")
ft_conventional <- ZHe_cdf_data %>%
  filter(Date_Type == "ZHe.Report")
ft_deposition <- ZHe_cdf_data %>%
  filter(Date_Type == "FT_date_plot")
ks_none <- ks.test(x = ft_conventional$Date, y = ft_none$Date, alternative = "two.sided")
ks_deposition <- ks.test(x = ft_conventional$Date, y = ft_deposition$Date, alternative = "two.sided")

zhe_cdf <- ZHe_cdf_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Date, group = FT_cor, color = FT_cor)) +
  annotate("rect", ymax = Inf, ymin = - Inf, xmin = 985.5-35.8, xmax = 992.51 + 0.64, fill = "#437DBF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 992.51, linewidth = 0.5, color = "#437DBF") +
  stat_ecdf() +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  xlim(00, 2000) +
  xlab("ZHe Date (Ma)") +
  #scale_x_continuous(name = "207Pb/206Pb Date (Ma)", breaks = seq(1000, 3000, 500)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("None" = "gray", "Conventional (Entire History)" = "black", "Since Deposition Only" = "red"), name = "FT Correction") +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "Cumulative Distribution Function", labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.001)) +
  annotate("text", x = 1200, y = 0.26, label = paste("n =", nrow(ZHe_cdf_data)/nlevels(ZHe_cdf_data$FT_cor), sep = " "), colour =  "black", hjust = 0) +
  annotate("text", x = 1200, y = 0.20, label = paste("K-S p-value =", signif(ks_none$p.value, 2)), colour =  "gray", hjust = 0) +
  annotate("text", x = 1200, y = 0.14, label = paste("K-S p-value =", signif(ks_deposition$p.value, 2)), colour =  "red", hjust = 0) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.position = c(0.75,0.5),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 9),
    plot.title = element_text(size=12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 11))
  # theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 0.75),
  #       panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.75),
  #       axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
  #       axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
  #       axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
  #       axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
  #       plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
  #       legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
  #       legend.key = element_blank(),
  #       legend.position = c(0.85,0.75),
  #       legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
  #       legend.title = element_text(size = 11))
zhe_cdf

ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R.Fig.S2C.pdf", plot = zhe_cdf, width = 6.5, height = 3)
```

```{r load and extract model parameters, echo = F}
### IMPORT FILES ----
mod.type <- "Single"
path.name <- "/Volumes/LaCie/Jacobsville_Models_2025/2026_01_09_open_neo" # less restrictive models (Table S4)
# path.name <- "/Volumes/LaCie/Jacobsville_Models_2025/2025_11_12_neoproterozoic_restrictive_0.5" # more restrictive models (Table S5)
files <- list.files(path = path.name, pattern = ".txt", all.files = TRUE)
files <- files[str_starts(files, "._", negate = T)] # this is necesary to remove the "ghost files" present on the external drive files are being read in from


### GROUPED GRAIN MODELS ----
date.predictions <- data.frame("Hft.File" = NA, "Sample" = NA, "Path"  = NA,
                               "Com.GOF" = NA, "Date" = NA, "GOF" = NA)
date.predictions <- date.predictions[F, ]

all.paths <- data.frame("Type" = NA, "Sample"  = NA, "Path" = NA, "Date" = NA,
                               "Com.GOF" = NA, "GOF" = NA, "Time.Dep" = NA,
                        "Time.Unc" = NA, "Max.Temp" = NA, "Max.Time" = NA,
                        "Hft.File" = NA)
all.paths <- all.paths[F, ]

neo.heating.summary <- data.frame("Type" = NA, "Sample" = NA, "Mean_Date" = NA, "Mean_Com.GOF" = NA, "Max_Dep" = NA, "Min_Dep" = NA,
                                  "Mean_Dep" = NA, "Med_Dep" = NA, "Mean_Unc" = NA,
                                  "Max_Max" = NA, "Min_Max" = NA, "Med_Max" = NA, "Time_Max_Max" = NA, 
                                  "Time_Min_Max" = NA, "Time_Med_Max" = NA, "Hft.File" = NA)
neo.heating.summary <- neo.heating.summary[F, ]

pre.deposition.summary <- data.frame("Type" = NA, "Sample" = NA, "Mean_Date" = NA, "Mean_Com.GOF" = NA, "Mean_Dep" = NA, "First_PRZ_Cool_Time" = NA,
                                     "Last_PRZ_Cool_Time" = NA, "Med_PRZ_Cool_Time" = NA, "First_20_Cool_Time" = NA, 
                                     "Last_20_Cool_Time" = NA, "Med_20_Cool_Time" = NA, "First_PRZ_Cool_Temp" = NA,
                                     "Last_PRZ_Cool_Temp" = NA, "Med_PRZ_Cool_Temp" = NA, "First_20_Cool_Temp" = NA, 
                                     "Last_20_Cool_Temp" = NA, "Med_20_Cool_Temp" = NA, "Hft.File" = NA)
pre.deposition.summary <- pre.deposition.summary[F, ]



### GROUPED GRAIN MODELS ----
#i = 14
tictoc::tic()
for(i in 1:length(files)){
#for(i in 17:17){ # testing single file
  file.name <- paste(path.name, files[i], sep = "/")
  hft.file <- strsplit(files[i], "-inv-")[[1]][1]
  #sample <- sub(".txt", "", strsplit(files[i], "-inv-")[[1]][2]])
  
  
  file <- read_lines(file.name) # import using file path
  
  #### Isolate Paths ----
  ## Paths are bracketed by entries that begin with "Individual Paths"
  ## followed by 3 lines of header
  
  path_bounds <- which(str_detect(file, "^Individual paths")) #find index of bounds
  path_data <- file[(path_bounds[1]+4):length(file)] # subset paths
  path_data <- matrix(path_data) # convert to matrix for easier parsing
  # each path is 2 lines
  path_data_parse <- data.frame(t(sapply(strsplit(path_data, '\t'), c))) # make into data frame
  path_data_parse$X2[1] <- "0" # fill first path value with 0 as in the others
  path_data_parse <- path_data_parse %>% # remove empty columns at end of data frame
    mutate_all(~ na_if(.,"")) %>%
    select(!where(~ all(is.na(.x))))
  header <- strsplit(file[(path_bounds[1]+3)], '\t')[[1]]
  samples <- strsplit(file[(path_bounds[1]+1)], '\t')[[1]]
  samples <- samples[-c(1,2)]
  samples <- sub("^([^_]*_[^_]*).*", "\\1", samples)
  
  #### Subset longform data ----
  row_odd <- seq_len(nrow(path_data_parse)) %% 2 # create odd and even row index
  time.rows <- path_data_parse[row_odd == 1, ] # extract odd rows which contain time steps, bin predictions
  temp.rows <- path_data_parse[row_odd == 0, ] # extract even rows which contain temp steps, GOF
  num_path <- nrow(time.rows) # total number of paths
  num_dates <- sum(str_detect(sapply(strsplit(file[(path_bounds[1]+3)], '\t'), c), "^GOF"), na.rm = TRUE) # find the number of modeled dates
  temp.rows$X2 <- as.numeric(temp.rows$X2)
  time.rows$v1 <- rep("", num_path)
  time.rows$minGOF <- rep("", num_path) # isolate minimum GOF value
  temp.rows$v2 <- rep("", num_path)
  
  ## pivot longer to put in plotting format
  path.start <- which(time.rows[1, ] == "Time (Ma)", arr.ind = TRUE)[2] #find start of path time/temp steps
  piv <- names(time.rows[ , (path.start + 1):(ncol(time.rows)-2)]) # column names to pivot
  time.long <- time.rows %>% pivot_longer(cols = all_of(piv), values_to = "Time") # all_of() silences the warning message 
  temp.long <- temp.rows %>% pivot_longer(cols = all_of(piv), values_to = "Temp")
  
  ## create columns headers 
  time.header <- c("Path", "Delete") # "Delete" is an empty column retained from the original HeFTy file
  temp.header <- c("Path1", "Com.GOF") # "Path1" is a duplicate of "Path" and will be deleted when combined
  for (j in 1:num_dates){
    time.header <- c(time.header, paste("Date", samples[j], sep = ".")) # save preds.df column names for later use
    temp.header <- c(temp.header, paste("GOF", samples[j], sep = ".")) # save paths.df column names for later use
  }
  time.header <- c(time.header, "Delete2", "v1","minGOF","name1", "Time") # "Delete" columns are duplicates between the two vectors
  temp.header <- c(temp.header, "Delete3", "v2","name2", "Temp")
  colnames(time.long) <- time.header
  colnames(temp.long) <- temp.header
  
  ## combine time and temp dataframes to create one dataframe with all information for plotting
  com.paths <- cbind(time.long,temp.long)
  com.paths.clean = subset(com.paths, select = -c(Delete, Delete2, Delete3, name1, name2, Path1))
  #paths.df.1 <- com.paths.clean %>% select(Path, Time, Temp, Date.1, Com.GOF)
  paths.df.1 <- com.paths.clean %>% select(!c(v1, minGOF, v2))
  paths.df <- paths.df.1 %>% mutate(across(!c("Path"), as.numeric)) # convert numeric values
  paths.df <- paths.df %>% # remove paths that go back in time (not allowed)
    group_by(Path) %>% # group by path name
    mutate(Invalid = case_when(lead(Time, n = 1) - Time > 0 ~ NA,
                               .default = 1)) %>% # check for paths that go back in time
    mutate(Remove = case_when(any(is.na(Invalid)) == T ~ NA,
                              .default = 1)) %>%
    drop_na(Remove)

  # isolate and save best and worst fit paths for inputting into HeFTy
  best <- paths.df %>%
    filter(Path == "Best")
  # write.table(best[, 2:3], file = paste(path.name, paste(sample, mod.type, "bf.txt", sep = "-"), sep = "/"), sep = "\t", 
  #             row.names = F, col.names = F)
  worst <- paths.df[which(paths.df$Com.GOF == min(paths.df$Com.GOF)), ]
  while(length(unique(worst$Path)) > 1){
    worst <- worst %>%
      filter(Path == worst$Path[1])
  }
  # write.table(worst[, 2:3], file = paste(path.name, paste(sample, mod.type, "wf.txt", sep = "-"), sep = "/"), sep = "\t", 
  #             row.names = F, col.names = F)
  
  keep <- rbind(best, worst) %>%
    mutate(#Sample = sample,
           Hft.File = hft.file) %>%
    select(!c("Time", "Temp")) %>%
    unique() %>%
    mutate(Path = case_when(Path == "Best" ~ "Best",
                            .default = "Worst")) #%>%
  
  names <- colnames(keep)
  keep <- keep %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = names[c(which(str_starts(colnames(keep), "Date")), which(str_starts(colnames(keep), "GOF")))], 
                 names_to = "Sample", values_to = "Prediction") %>%
    mutate(Type.Prediction = case_when(str_detect(Sample, "GOF") ~ "GOF",
                                       .default = "Date")) %>%
    mutate(Sample = sub("Date.", "", Sample)) %>%
    mutate(Sample = sub("GOF.", "", Sample)) %>%
    pivot_wider(id_cols = c(Path, Com.GOF, Hft.File, Sample), values_from = Prediction, names_from = Type.Prediction)

    
  
  date.predictions <- rbind(date.predictions, keep[ , c(3, 4, 1, 2, 5, 6)]) # add to saved data frame
  
  ### find max and min temps in Neoproterozoic burial
  
  deposition.box <- paths.df %>%
    filter(between(Time, 949.7, 993.15)) %>%
    mutate(Type = case_when(str_detect(Path, "Acc") == T ~ "Acceptable",
                            .default = "Good"))
  
  deposition.min <- deposition.box %>%
    group_by(Type, Path) %>%
    filter(Temp == min(Temp)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    rename("Time.Dep" = "Time", "Temp.Dep" = "Temp") %>%
    select(Path, Time.Dep)
  
  unconformity.box <- paths.df %>%
    filter(between(Time, 483, 497)) %>% # larger than actual constraint box to keep max number paths
    mutate(Type = case_when(str_detect(Path, "Acc") == T ~ "Acceptable",
                            .default = "Good"))
  
  unconformity.min <- unconformity.box %>%
    group_by(Type, Path) %>%
    filter(Temp == min(Temp)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    rename("Time.Unc" = "Time", "Temp.Unc" = "Temp") %>%
    select(Path, Time.Unc)
  
  ### add pivot for predicted dates and GOF here
  neo.path.seg <- full_join(paths.df, deposition.min, by = "Path") %>%
    full_join(unconformity.min, by = "Path") %>%
    mutate(Type = case_when(str_detect(Path, "Acc") == T ~ "Acceptable",
                            .default = "Good")) %>%
    group_by(Type, Path) %>%
    filter(between(Time, Time.Unc, Time.Dep))
  
  neo.names <- colnames(neo.path.seg)
  neo.path.seg <- neo.path.seg %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = neo.names[c(which(str_starts(colnames(neo.path.seg), "Date")), which(str_starts(colnames(neo.path.seg), "GOF")))], 
                 names_to = "Sample", values_to = "Prediction") %>%
    mutate(Type.Prediction = case_when(str_detect(Sample, "GOF") ~ "GOF",
                                       .default = "Date")) %>%
    mutate(Sample = sub("Date.", "", Sample)) %>%
    mutate(Sample = sub("GOF.", "", Sample)) %>%
    pivot_wider(values_from = Prediction, names_from = Type.Prediction) %>%
    group_by(Sample, .add = T)
  
  each_path <- neo.path.seg %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    group_by(Sample, Path) %>%
    summarize(Type = unique(Type), Sample = unique(Sample), Path = unique(Path), Date = unique(Date), Com.GOF = unique(Com.GOF), GOF = unique(GOF), Time.Dep = unique(Time.Dep),
              Time.Unc = unique(Time.Unc), Max.Temp = max(Temp),
              Max.Time = Time[which(Temp == max(Temp))], .groups = "keep") %>%
    mutate(Hft.File = hft.file)
  
  all.paths <- rbind(all.paths, each_path)
  
  all_paths <- each_path %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    group_by(Type, Sample) %>%
    summarize(Type = unique(Type), Sample = unique(Sample), Mean_Date = mean(Date), Mean_Com.GOF = mean(Com.GOF), Max_Dep = max(Time.Dep), Min_Dep = min(Time.Dep),
              Mean_Dep = mean(Time.Dep), Med_Dep = median(Time.Dep), Mean_Unc = mean(Time.Unc),
              Max_Max = max(Max.Temp), Min_Max = min(Max.Temp), Med_Max = median(Max.Temp), 
              Time_Max_Max = max(Max.Time), Time_Min_Max = min(Max.Time), Time_Med_Max = median(Max.Time),
              .groups = "keep") %>%
    mutate(Hft.File = hft.file)
  
  neo.heating.summary <- rbind(neo.heating.summary, all_paths)
  
  ### pre-deposition summary of when samples cool below PRZ and 20°C
  cool.box <- paths.df %>%
    filter(Time >= 949.7) %>%
    mutate(Type = case_when(str_detect(Path, "Acc") == T ~ "Acceptable",
                            .default = "Good"))
  PRZ <- cool.box %>%
    group_by(Type, Path) %>%
    filter(Temp <= 140) %>%
    filter(Time == max(Time)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    rename("Time.PRZ" = "Time", "Temp.PRZ" = "Temp") %>%
    select(Path, Time.PRZ, Temp.PRZ)
  
  surface <- cool.box %>%
    group_by(Type, Path) %>%
    filter(Temp <= 20) %>%
    filter(Time == max(Time)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    rename("Time.20" = "Time", "Temp.20" = "Temp") %>%
    select(Path, Time.20, Temp.20)
  
  
  pre.paths <- full_join(PRZ, surface, by = "Path") %>%
    full_join(deposition.min, by = "Path") %>%
    full_join(paths.df, by = "Path") %>%
    mutate(Type = case_when(str_detect(Path, "Acc") == T ~ "Acceptable",
                            .default = "Good")) %>%
    group_by(Type, Path)
  
  pre.names <- colnames(pre.paths)
  pre.paths <- pre.paths %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = pre.names[c(which(str_starts(colnames(pre.paths), "Date")), which(str_starts(colnames(pre.paths), "GOF")))], 
                 names_to = "Sample", values_to = "Prediction") %>%
    mutate(Type.Prediction = case_when(str_detect(Sample, "GOF") ~ "GOF",
                                       .default = "Date")) %>%
    mutate(Sample = sub("Date.", "", Sample)) %>%
    mutate(Sample = sub("GOF.", "", Sample)) %>%
    pivot_wider(values_from = Prediction, names_from = Type.Prediction) %>%
    group_by(Sample, .add = T)
  
  each_pre_path <- pre.paths %>%
    summarize(Type = unique(Type), Sample = unique(Sample), Date = unique(Date), Com.GOF = unique(Com.GOF), Time.Dep = unique(Time.Dep),
              Time.PRZ = unique(Time.PRZ), Temp.PRZ = unique(Temp.PRZ), Time.20 = unique(Time.20),
              Temp.20 = unique(Temp.20), .groups = "keep") %>%
    mutate(Hft.File = hft.file)
  
  all_pre_paths <- each_pre_path %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    group_by(Type, Sample) %>%
    summarize(Type = unique(Type), Sample = unique(Sample), Mean_Date = mean(Date), 
              Mean_Com.GOF = mean(Com.GOF), Mean_Dep = mean(Time.Dep), 
              First_PRZ_Cool_Time = max(Time.PRZ), Last_PRZ_Cool_Time = min(Time.PRZ), 
              Med_PRZ_Cool_Time = median(Time.PRZ), First_20_Cool_Time = max(Time.20), 
              Last_20_Cool_Time = min(Time.20), Med_20_Cool_Time = median(Time.20),
              First_PRZ_Cool_Temp = max(Temp.PRZ), Last_PRZ_Cool_Temp = min(Temp.PRZ), 
              Med_PRZ_Cool_Temp = median(Temp.PRZ), First_20_Cool_Temp = max(Temp.20), 
              Last_20_Cool_Temp = min(Temp.20), Med_20_Cool_Temp = median(Temp.20),
              .groups = "keep") %>%
    mutate(Hft.File = hft.file)
  pre.deposition.summary <- rbind(pre.deposition.summary, all_pre_paths)

}
tictoc::toc()
```
```{r merge model predictions with data}
data_merge <- ZHe_plot_data %>%
  is.na(Rejection) %>%
  mutate(FT_date_plot = case_when(is.na(Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance) == F ~ Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance,
                                  .default = ZHe.Report)) %>%
  mutate(FT_date_plot.1s = case_when(is.na(Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance) == F ~ Corrected.Date.No.FT.Inheritance.Analytical.Uncertainty.1s,
                                  .default = ZHe.Report.1s)) %>%
  mutate(FT.Applied = case_when(is.na(Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance) == F ~ "Since Deposition Only",
                                .default = FT.Applied))

all_dates <- date.predictions %>%
  separate_wider_delim(Sample, "_", names = c("Run", "Grain")) %>%
  mutate(Grain = gsub("z", "", Grain)) %>%
  mutate(across(c("Run", "Grain"), as.numeric)) %>%
  mutate("Sample" = "BP22-02", .after = 2) %>%
  full_join(data_merge, by = c("Run", "Sample", "Grain"))

neo.heating.summary <- neo.heating.summary %>%
  separate_wider_delim(Sample, "_", names = c("Run", "Grain")) %>%
  mutate(Grain = gsub("z", "", Grain)) %>%
  mutate(across(c("Run", "Grain"), as.numeric)) %>%
  mutate("Sample" = "BP22-02", .after = 2) %>%
  full_join(data_merge, by = c("Run", "Sample", "Grain"))

pre.deposition.summary <- pre.deposition.summary %>%
  separate_wider_delim(Sample, "_", names = c("Run", "Grain")) %>%
  mutate(Grain = gsub("z", "", Grain)) %>%
  mutate(across(c("Run", "Grain"), as.numeric)) %>%
  mutate("Sample" = "BP22-02", .after = 2) %>%
  full_join(data_merge, by = c("Run", "Sample", "Grain"))

all.paths <- all.paths %>%
  separate_wider_delim(Sample, "_", names = c("Run", "Grain")) %>%
  mutate(Grain = gsub("z", "", Grain)) %>%
  mutate(across(c("Run", "Grain"), as.numeric)) %>%
  mutate("Sample" = "BP22-02", .after = 2) %>%
  full_join(data_merge, by = c("Run", "Sample", "Grain"))
```
```{r plot pre-deposition cooling, echo = F}
# plot shows that grains likely exhumed at variable times, though they can ALL exhume during Rigolet Orogeny
dep.cooling <- pre.deposition.summary %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c("First_PRZ_Cool_Time", "Last_PRZ_Cool_Time", "Med_PRZ_Cool_Time", "First_20_Cool_Time", "Last_20_Cool_Time", "Med_20_Cool_Time"),
               values_to = "Time", names_to = "Time.ID") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c("First_PRZ_Cool_Temp", "Last_PRZ_Cool_Temp", "Med_PRZ_Cool_Temp", "First_20_Cool_Temp", "Last_20_Cool_Temp", "Med_20_Cool_Temp"),
               values_to = "Temp", names_to = "Temp.ID") %>%
  filter((Time.ID == "First_PRZ_Cool_Time" & Temp.ID == "First_PRZ_Cool_Temp") |
           (Time.ID == "Last_PRZ_Cool_Time" & Temp.ID == "Last_PRZ_Cool_Temp") |
           (Time.ID == "Med_PRZ_Cool_Time" & Temp.ID == "Med_PRZ_Cool_Temp") |
           (Time.ID == "First_20_Cool_Time" & Temp.ID == "First_20_Cool_Temp") |
           (Time.ID == "Last_20_Cool_Time" & Temp.ID == "Last_20_Cool_Temp") |
           (Time.ID == "Med_20_Cool_Time" & Temp.ID == "Med_20_Cool_Temp")) %>%
  mutate(Threshold = case_when(str_detect(Time.ID, "PRZ") == T ~ "PRZ",
                        .default = "Surface")) %>%
  mutate(Cooling = case_when(str_detect(Time.ID, "First") ~ "Earliest",
                              str_detect(Time.ID, "Med") ~ "Median",
                              .default = "Latest")) #%>%
  # select(!c("Time.ID", "Temp.ID")) %>%
  # mutate(Age = as.factor(case_when(Upb.Date > 1250 ~ "Grenville Granite Rhyolite Province",
  #                                  .default = "Grenville Orogeny")))
#filter(name != "Med_Max")
pre.dep.cooling.plot <- dep.cooling %>%
  filter(Type == "Good") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Time, y = Temp, color = ZHe.Report, shape = as.factor(Age_Group))) +
  #geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "black") +
  #geom_hline(yintercept = 140, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  #geom_hline(yintercept = 220, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_point() +
  #geom_label() +
  #geom_text(data = filter(temp.plot.heating, Sample == "2_114"), aes(x = Time, y = Temp,
                                                                  #   label = Sample), color = "black", size = 0.3) +
  scale_x_reverse(name = "Time (Ma)") +
  scale_y_reverse(name = "Temp (°C)", limits = c(140, 0), breaks = seq(140, 0, -20)) +
  scale_color_viridis(name = "Reported ZHe (Ma)") +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 1),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 1),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  facet_grid(as.factor(Cooling) ~ as.factor(Threshold))
pre.dep.cooling.plot
#ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R_Figure_Outputs/R.Model.Deposition.Time.pdf", pre.dep.cooling.plot, dpi = 300, height = 6.5, width = 6.5)
```
```{r plot max neoproterozic heating model compilation, echo = F}
all.paths.filtered <- all.paths %>%
  filter(Type == "Good" | Type == "Best") %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(Analysis = paste(Run, Sample, Grain, sep = "_")) %>%
  group_by(Analysis) %>%
  mutate(Family = case_when(all(Max.Temp < 140)  ~ "Required < PRZ",
                            all(Max.Temp < 220) & any(Max.Temp < 140) ~ "Required PRZ or <",
                            all(Max.Temp > 140) ~ "Required PRZ or >",
                            .default = "Permissive")) %>%
  mutate(Family_fac = factor(Family, levels = c("Permissive", "Required PRZ or >", "Required PRZ or <")))

filter.summary.Family <- all.paths.filtered %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(c(Analysis, Family)) %>%
  distinct(Analysis, Family, .keep_all = T) %>%
  count(Family) %>%
  rename("nfam" = "n")

all.paths.filtered <- all.paths.filtered %>%
  left_join(filter.summary.Family, by = "Family")

all.paths.plot <- all.paths.filtered %>%  
  group_by(Family, .add = TRUE) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Max.Time, y = Max.Temp, color = ZHe.Report)) +
  #annotate("rect", xmin = 1000, xmax = 700, ymin = 130, ymax = 250, alpha = 0.1, fill = "orange") +
  #annotate("rect", xmin = 1000, xmax = 700, ymin = 172.5, ymax = 182.5, alpha = 0.1, fill = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 140, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 220, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_point() +
  scale_x_reverse(name = "Time (Ma)") +
  scale_y_reverse(name = "Temp (°C)", limits = c(300, 0), breaks = seq(300, 0, -50)) +
  geom_text(aes(x = 800, y = 300, label = paste("n =", nfam, "grains", sep = " ")), color = "black", size = 2) +
  scale_color_viridis(name = "ZHe Date (Ma)", limits = c(375, 1400)) +
  ggtitle("Modeled Maximum Neoproterozoic Temperature and Time") +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 1),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 1),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  facet_wrap(vars(as.factor(Family)))
all.paths.plot
ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R_Figure_Outputs/R.Model.Max.Heating.Family.pdf", all.paths.plot, dpi = 300, height = 6.5, width = 6.5)
```
```{r plot max neoproterozic heating grouped by type of heating, echo = F}
max.max.temp <- all.paths.filtered %>%
  group_by(Analysis) %>%
  summarise(across(Max.Temp, max)) %>%
  rename("Max.Max.Temp" = "Max.Temp")

min.max.temp <- all.paths.filtered %>%
  group_by(Analysis) %>%
  summarise(across(Max.Temp, min)) %>%
  rename("Min.Max.Temp" = "Max.Temp")

all.paths.max <- all.paths.filtered %>%
  left_join(max.max.temp, by = "Analysis") %>%
  left_join(min.max.temp, by = "Analysis")

neo.heat.permissive <- all.paths.max %>%  
  ungroup() %>% # have to do this to use fct_reorder
  filter(Family == "Permissive") %>%
  filter(between(Max.Temp, 130, 250)) %>% # only PRZ
  arrange(Max.Max.Temp) %>%
  mutate(Analysis_fac = fct_reorder(Analysis, Max.Max.Temp)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Max.Time, y = Max.Temp, color = GOF, shape = FT.Applied)) +
  #annotate("rect", xmin = 1000, xmax = 700, ymin = 130, ymax = 250, alpha = 0.1, fill = "orange") +
  #annotate("rect", xmin = 1000, xmax = 700, ymin = 172.5, ymax = 182.5, alpha = 0.1, fill = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 140, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 220, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_point() +
  scale_x_reverse(name = "Time (Ma)") +
  scale_y_reverse(name = "Temp (°C)", limits = c(300, 0), breaks = seq(300, 0, -50)) +
  geom_text(aes(x = 600, y = 250, label = paste(ZHe.Report, "±", ZHe.Report.1s, "Ma", sep = " ")), color = "black", size = 2) +
  scale_color_viridis(name = "GOF", limits = c(0.7, 1), na.value = "gray") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("No" = 15, "Yes" = 16, "Since Deposition Only" = 17), name = "FT Applied") +
  #ggtitle("Modeled Maximum Neoproterozoic Temperature and Time") +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 1),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 1),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  facet_wrap(~Analysis_fac, ncol = 3, dir = "h")
neo.heat.permissive
ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R_Figure_Outputs/R.Model.Max.Heating.Permissive.PRZ.pdf", neo.heat.permissive, dpi = 300, height = 17, width = 6.5)


neo.heat.cool <- all.paths.max %>%  
  ungroup() %>% # have to do this to use fct_reorder
  filter(Family == "Required PRZ or <") %>%
  filter(between(Max.Temp, 130, 250)) %>% # only PRZ
  arrange(Max.Max.Temp) %>%
  mutate(Analysis_fac = fct_reorder(Analysis, Max.Max.Temp)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Max.Time, y = Max.Temp, color = GOF, shape = FT.Applied)) +
  #annotate("rect", xmin = 1000, xmax = 700, ymin = 130, ymax = 250, alpha = 0.1, fill = "orange") +
  #annotate("rect", xmin = 1000, xmax = 700, ymin = 172.5, ymax = 182.5, alpha = 0.1, fill = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 140, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 220, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = Max.Max.Temp), color = "gray", linetype = "solid") +
  geom_point() +
  scale_x_reverse(name = "Time (Ma)") +
  scale_y_reverse(name = "Temp (°C)", limits = c(300, 0), breaks = seq(300, 0, -50)) +
  geom_text(aes(x = 600, y = 250, label = paste(ZHe.Report, "±", ZHe.Report.1s, "Ma", sep = " ")), color = "black", size = 3) +
  geom_text(aes(x = 600, y = 175, label = paste(round(Max.Max.Temp, 0), "°C", sep = " ")), color = "gray", size = 3) +
  #scale_color_viridis(name = "ZHe Date (Ma)", limits = c(375, 1400)) +
  scale_color_viridis(name = "GOF", limits = c(0.7, 1), na.value = "gray") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("No" = 15, "Yes" = 16, "Since Deposition Only" = 17), name = "FT Applied") +
  #ggtitle("Modeled Maximum Neoproterozoic Temperature and Time") +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 1),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 1),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  facet_wrap(~Analysis_fac, ncol = 3, dir = "h")
neo.heat.cool
ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R_Figure_Outputs/R.Model.Max.Heating.Cool.PRZ.pdf", neo.heat.cool, dpi = 300, height = 5.3, width = 6.5)

neo.heat.hot <- all.paths.max %>%  
  ungroup() %>% # have to do this to use fct_reorder
  filter(Family == "Required PRZ or >") %>%
  filter(between(Max.Temp, 130, 250)) %>% # only PRZ
  arrange(Min.Max.Temp) %>%
  mutate(Analysis_fac = fct_reorder(Analysis, Min.Max.Temp)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Max.Time, y = Max.Temp, color = GOF, shape = FT.Applied)) +
  #annotate("rect", xmin = 1000, xmax = 700, ymin = 130, ymax = 250, alpha = 0.1, fill = "orange") +
```
