```{r plot max neoproterozic heating grouped by type of heating, echo = F}
  #annotate("rect", xmin = 1000, xmax = 700, ymin = 172.5, ymax = 182.5, alpha = 0.1, fill = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 140, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 220, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = Min.Max.Temp), color = "gray", linetype = "solid") +
  geom_point() +
  scale_x_reverse(name = "Time (Ma)") +
  scale_y_reverse(name = "Temp (°C)", limits = c(300, 0), breaks = seq(300, 0, -50)) +
  geom_text(aes(x = 600, y = 250, label = paste(ZHe.Report, "±", ZHe.Report.1s, "Ma", sep = " ")), color = "black", size = 3) +
  geom_text(aes(x = 600, y = 50, label = paste(round(Min.Max.Temp,0) , "°C", sep = " ")), color = "gray", size = 3) +
  scale_color_viridis(name = "GOF", limits = c(0.7, 1), na.value = "gray") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("No" = 15, "Yes" = 16, "Since Deposition Only" = 17), name = "FT Applied") +
  #ggtitle("Modeled Maximum Neoproterozoic Temperature and Time") +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 1),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 1),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  facet_wrap(~Analysis_fac, ncol = 3, dir = "h")
neo.heat.hot
ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R_Figure_Outputs/R.Model.Max.Heating.Hot.PRZ.pdf", neo.heat.hot, dpi = 300, height = 8.2, width = 6.5)
```
```{r plot max neoproterozic heating model compilation, echo = F}
all.paths.overlay <- all.paths.filtered %>%  
  group_by(Family_fac, .add = TRUE) %>%
  arrange(Family_fac) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Max.Time, y = Max.Temp, colour = Family_fac)) +
  #annotate("rect", xmin = 1000, xmax = 700, ymin = 130, ymax = 250, alpha = 0.1, fill = "orange") +
  #annotate("rect", xmin = 1000, xmax = 700, ymin = 172.5, ymax = 182.5, alpha = 0.1, fill = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 140, color = "black", linetype = "dashed", alpha = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 220, color = "black", linetype = "dashed", alpha = 1) +
  geom_point(shape = 16, size = 0.5, alpha = 1) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Permissive" = "green", "Required PRZ or >" = "red", "Required PRZ or <" = "blue")) +
  scale_x_reverse(name = "Time (Ma)") +
  scale_y_reverse(name = "Temp (°C)", limits = c(300, 0), breaks = seq(300, 0, -50)) +
  #geom_text(aes(x = 800, y = 300, label = paste("n =", nfam, "grains", sep = " ")), color = "black", size = 2) +
  #scale_color_viridis(name = "ZHe Date (Ma)", limits = c(375, 1400)) +
  #ggtitle("Modeled Maximum Neoproterozoic Temperature and Time") +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 1),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 1),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) #+
  # facet_wrap(vars(interaction(as.factor(Family))))
all.paths.overlay
ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R_Figure_Outputs/R.Model.Max.Heating.Overlay.pdf", all.paths.overlay, dpi = 300, height = 6.5, width = 6.5)
```
